error_signature: %error: <file>:<n>: unknown verilator lint message code: 'unused signals', in '/*verilator lint_off unused signals*/' <n> | /*verilator lint_off unused signals*/ | ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ %error: exiting due to <n> error(s)
raw_error_example:
%Error: output/fir_filter.sv:129:5: Unknown verilator lint message code: 'UNUSED signals', in '/*verilator lint_off UNUSED signals*/'
  129 |     /*verilator lint_off UNUSED signals*/ 
      |     ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
root_cause: Verilator lint pragma `/*verilator lint_off UNUSED signals*/` was incorrectly spelled with a space in "UNUSED signals" instead of "UNUSEDSIGNAL".
fix_rule: Use correct Verilator lint message codes without spaces; for example, use `/*verilator lint_off UNUSEDSIGNAL*/` instead of `/*verilator lint_off UNUSED signals*/`.
